realms.name: Pham The
realms.description: Giai doan than the con nang pham tuc, chi vua du mang khi ma chua biet giu khi.
realms.flavorText: Diem bat dau cua phan lon nguoi tu, noi ben bi quan trong hon thien tu.

realms.name: Luyen Khi
realms.description: Biet dan linh khi nhap than va giu nhip tu hanh so bo, la nen cua moi dao lo ve sau.
realms.flavorText: Luyen Khi khong lam nguoi tu manh ngay, nhung khien moi quyet dinh ve tai nguyen co trong luong hon truoc.

realms.name: Truc Co
realms.description: Can co duoc dung thanh nen, kha nang chiu ap luc va tiep can cong trinh lan nghi thuc cao hon.
realms.flavorText: Tu day nguoi tu bat dau thuc su tro thanh mot tru cot co the ganh viec cho tong mon.

realms.name: Kim Dan
realms.description: Noi tuc ket tu thanh hach ben, du de ganh nhung nghi thuc, di tuong va quyet sach nang hon muc thuong.
realms.flavorText: Kim Dan khong chi la tang luc, ma la kha nang dung vung khi su that va quyen luc cung de xuong.

realms.name: Nguyen Anh
realms.description: Mot nguong cao hiem hoi trong pham vi base game, du de cham vao tang quyet dinh cuoi cua dao lo ma khong tan vo ngay.
realms.flavorText: Nguyen Anh trong Nhat Niem Khai Tong la bac cua trach nhiem lon, khong phai giay phep cho power fantasy vo gia.
realms.futureArcHint: Sau Nguyen Anh la nguong Hoa Than tro len, thuoc mach mo rong hau pham gioi chua mo trong ban hien tai.

futureRealms.name: Hoa Than
futureRealms.summary: Nguong canh gioi danh dau viec roi khoi logic co ban cua pham gioi. Hien tai chi duoc dat moc du lieu de phuc vu mo rong ve sau.
